summary: FPV drones are being used to strike Russian soldiers on motorcycles assaulting Ukrainian positions and to kill a Russian soldier who attempted to fake surrender before fleeing toward comrades. Ukrainian forces reportedly survived a Russian FPV drone attack in the Kostiantinivka direction, with a drone detector alerting them at 0:11 in footage from the 36th Marine Brigade. Operators of the Rubicon Center conducted combat operations on April 16-17, 2026, destroying 105 Ukrainian targets including personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, and conducting remote mining of logistics routes, while cooperating with Russian Aerospace Forces to target Ukrainian UAV launch points.
